case_title: THE BARRICADE COMPANY & TRAFFIC SUPPLY, INC. VS. AAA CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE BARRICADE COMPANY & TRAFFIC SUPPLY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AAA CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC. $4,103.08 PRINCIPAL, $296.77 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,579.85, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $130.00) SERVED DEC-27-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AAA CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT AAA CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC., RETURNED "MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BARRICADE COMPANY & TRAFFIC SUPPLY, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE BARRICADE COMPANY & TRAFFIC SUPPLY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AAA CONSTRUCTION GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
